setup.title: Table Companion — Setup

menu.name: Table Companion
menu.label: Open setup
menu.hint: Set up the Companion user and view the app link status.

setup.intro: Connect this world to the Table Companion app. Create the dedicated Companion user once, then paste its password (or scan the QR code) into the app to link your table.
setup.ownershipHint: Tip: give the Companion user Observer (to display) or Owner (to edit) permission on your players' characters, so the app can show and update their sheets.

status.linkedHint: Linked — the app is connected to this world.

notify.exists: The {name} user already exists — nothing changed.
notify.pairingReset: Agent pairing reset — the next agent connection will re-pair.
notify.noUser: Create the Companion user first, then you can reset its password.

password.title: Companion password
password.intro: The {name} user was created. Copy this password into the Table Companion app now — it is shown only once.
password.scanHint: Or scan this with the Table Companion app to pair instantly:
password.warning: Never log in to Foundry as {name} yourself: Foundry allows one session per user, so doing so disconnects the app.
password.copyManual: Could not copy automatically — select the password above and copy it manually.
password.recover: Lost it later? Open this setup and use Reset password to generate a new one — no need to delete the user or re-grant permissions.

error.gmOnly: Only a Gamemaster can run Table Companion setup.
error.createFailed: Could not create the Companion user.
error.resetFailed: Could not reset the Companion password.
